Experience The Power

The Future of Meteorology

F5CHASRai consolidates every critical data stream into a high-octane dashboard designed for high-stakes decision making in the field.

🛰️

Hybrid Radar Engine

Toggle between National Composite and Single-Site views. Powered by IEM, RainViewer, and NowCOAST MRMS for ultra-low latency reflectivity and velocity.

📊

Atmospheric conditions

Deep-dive into Thermodynamics, Kinematics, and Moisture data. Real-time CAPE, Shear, and PWAT analysis matched to your exact GPS coordinates.

🧠

JayAI Core

A field-responsive AI coordinate powered by Gemini 2.0 Flash. Real-time intercept guidance, storm analysis, and safety-critical escape routing.

⏳

Time Machine

Unlock historical archives. Analyze past events with full time-synced radar playback and meteorological state restoration.

🎯

Storm Track Planner

Project storm propagation paths with surgical precision. Intelligent intercept point suggestions based on current road networks.

⚠️

Alert Intelligence

Curated NWS alerts with context-aware filtering. Instant analysis of tornado, severe thunder, and flood threats in your path.

Designed for the Intercept

When seconds matter, clarity is king. Our dark-themed, glassmorphic UI minimizes glare in the vehicle while making critical threat data pop with high-visibility accents.

  • Dynamic Radar Tilts & Products
  • Automatic Location-Aware Soundings
  • One-Touch Emergency "Bail Out" Routing
  • High-Contrast Terrain & Road Basemaps
